heading: Alcohol-related facilities

children.text: under the Federal Alcohol Administration Act ( et seq.) or chapter 51 of subtitle E of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 ( et seq.) is required to obtain a permit or to register with the Secretary of the Treasury as a condition of doing business in the United States; and27 U.S.C. 20126 U.S.C. 5001

under is required to register as a facility because such facility is engaged in manufacturing, processing, packing, or holding 1 or more alcoholic beverages, with respect to the activities of such facility that relate to the manufacturing, processing, packing, or holding of alcoholic beverages.section 350d of this title

children.heading: Limited receipt and distribution of non-alcohol food
children.label: b Limited receipt and distribution of non-alcohol food

children.text: in a prepackaged form that prevents any direct human contact with such food; and
in amounts that constitute not more than 5 percent of the overall sales of such facility, as determined by the Secretary of the Treasury.

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: c Rule of construction
children.text: Except as provided in subsections (a) and (b), this section shall not be construed to exempt any food, other than alcoholic beverages, as defined in section 214 of the Federal Alcohol Administration Act (), from the requirements of this Act (including the amendments made by this Act).127 U.S.C. 214See References in Text note below.1
